feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: It's Just Smoke and Mirrors
entry.summary:
Author: therogueskimo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,364Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: “His name is Reginald,” Buck said, unable to keep a note of annoyance out of his voice.Ravi whistled. “Sounds fancy. You gonna go out with him?”“You guys are the worst,” Eddie grumbled, but he was smiling. Smiling because Reginald, a hot British man, had asked him out only an hour after Buck had tried to tell him how he felt.And there was also the fact that Reginald looked just like him. So somehow Eddie was attracted to Buck, but … not attracted to Buck. Buck couldn’t decide if this was a good thing or a bad thing. If Eddie stood them next to each other, would the problem solve itself? Or was it that stupid accent that made Reginald infinitely hotter and therefore removed any possibility that Buck could ever get Eddie to notice him that way?“Well, are you? Because if not, I might,” Harry said, which caused everyone to cackle.“We’ll see,” Eddie said, but the sparkle in his eyes said it all.___________5 times Eddie’s new boyfriend is a little too similar to Buck, and 1 time Eddie realizes it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: best friends, ex-friends 'til the end (better off as lovers)
entry.summary:
Author: drakesword

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,761Chapters: 32/40Kudos: 119

Summary: Sometimes, Eddie feels so guilty that he throws up. He doesn’t mean to, but it’s like all the guilt and shame in his stomach overflows until he can’t contain it anymore, and it spills out of him.When he spends time with Buck, the guilt is there too.It’s there when he avoids his touch, while he pretends not to see the hurt expression in Buck’s face. It’s there when he tells him that, really, he’s fine. It’s there when he asks Buck to play basketball or watch some football with him instead of letting himself just listen to him ramble for hours and hours.It goes to sleep with him and wakes him up in the morning. It creeps itself into every corner of his body, and eventually settles under his skin like a second layer. Or; AU where Buck and Eddie meet in middle school and quickly become best friends. But as they grow up alongside each other, their dynamic evolves more and more into something Eddie is not quite ready to face.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,887Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 17

entry.title: Stigma
entry.summary:
Author: gika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 219,480Chapters: 24/24Kudos: 147

Summary: When Eddie suddenly finds himself in debt and is desperate to prove his worth as a father, he decides to take on secret jobs as a male escort, all while hiding his new life from Christopher, his friends, and especially from Buck, the man who may always have been his true home.

entry.title: The Wait
entry.summary:
Author: Salenora

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,807Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 219

Summary: Post Lawsuit---------------------Buck is back to work but is on the outs.He goes out, has a one night stand.What could go wrong? Note: This fic is completely written, I will upload as I edit the chapters. So hopefully, you won't have to wait too long for uploads. 🩷 🩷 Please read with caution, this is a heavy fic, addressing alot of issues. 💔

entry.title: hot stud shows you how he loves it touched
entry.summary:
Author: Llexeh

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,948Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 159

Summary: “Are you -“ “Am I teasing my dick with my palm while thinking about your thighs and how they’d feel around my head? You bet,” Eddie chuckles. This time, Buck’s moan is loud and unabashed. “Whatever you want, Eds. Anything you want.” “God, Buck, I want to touch you everywhere. I want to spread you over my lap, face up so I can see your eyes. You’re so stupidly pretty.” Buck gasps, then there’s some rustling, then the sound gets clearer; Buck’s put airpods in too, also slow on the uptake. “Are you hard because of me?” There’s some smugness in his voice, Eddie knows all of Buck’s voices by heart, but also a needy breathlessness. Eddie snorts, frankly inelegant and borderline funny. “Baby, I’ve not stopped being hard since I clicked the link.”Or: Eddie Diaz, newly-minted queer (label pending), has a free afternoon and sits down to jerk off with a bit of porn. He can't quite believe the man in the video is a younger Buck, but the evidence is right there and the result is incredibly hot. He obviously calls Buck about it. They obviously end up fucking for 24 hours; they have all that time to make up for, after all.

entry.title: Full House
entry.summary:
Author: Im_Not_A_Sourwolf

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,500Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 190

Summary: “Uh… hey” Buck said slowly, like he was approaching a really wounded animal. “What’s going on?”. Eddie found his voice. It came out strangled. “Buck, please don’t freak out, but…” “Too late” Buck said immediately. His eyes were locked on the toddler. The kid’s face was turned into his mom’s leg, but Buck could still see part of him, he looked like…. Buck’s brain, which had been through fires, explosions, a tsunami, shootings, a lightning strike, a coma, almost literal hell, decided to take the worst possible route. Or The Buckley-Diaz family expands in the craziest way possible.

entry.title: We've Done Weirder Things
entry.summary:
Author: edsawrites

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,310Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 101

Summary: Buck accidentally kisses Eddie on the forehead while greeting him one afternoon. It should have been a weird one time thing, instead, it becomes an ongoing problem, and eventually a much bigger one, as they seem to enjoy deeper and deeper levels of affection. Neither Buck or Eddie are ready to examine what any of it means. But they've done weirder things.

entry.title: Buck was a Palmetto State Fox AU
entry.summary:
Author: MultiFandom_Trash23

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,964Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 92

Summary: Buck turns in a circle slowly while still making his way towards the stairs. The sight was amazing. The only other time he could remember feeling like this was the first time he stepped foot onto the Foxes Court. He stops at the base of the stairs and takes them slowly. When he reaches the top the smell of spaghetti, and the sound of his new team chattering amongst themselves hit his senses. It’s oddly reminiscent of the mandatory team dinners Dan implemented his first year at Palmetto and that Neil kept going after she graduated. He kept them going the year he was captain after Neil graduated too. He hopes Robin is still doing them. He approaches the table slowly. An Asian man is the first to spot him, his jaw drops, probably having recognized him. Buck had never really gotten used to the public aspect of being a Fox. Even now that he’s graduated people still recognize him all the time. Most of his classmates at the academy had recognized him pretty quickly. Most of them also wondered what he was doing there instead of in the National Exy League. “Hi, I’m Evan Buckley, I was told to report to Captain Nash.” He introduces himself. Or The AU where Buck was a Fox

entry.title: Dreams You'd Like To Sell
entry.summary:
Author: pollutedstar

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,371Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 33

Summary: The house hasn’t been this quiet since the day Eddie was hospitalized. It’s strange, this grief of grief, and Buck’s not sure what to do now that his preparations for the worst have amounted to nothing. He’ll have to give it back, he realizes, selfishly angry. He’ll have to give it all back. The house, the home, the make believe family. The two of them will end up with nothing but a legal contract in case of a hypothetical tragedy binding them together, and they’ll live apart, and he won’t get to cook dinner anymore or help out with homework or complain about TikTok music blaring from his Jeep’s speakers. He thinks to himself, I can’t believe Shannon would leave this. Which isn’t fair because he knows what it’s like to be abandoned at nineteen with an improper send off and a trembling hand. But he has to think that, because otherwise he has to confront his real horror: I can’t believe Eddie would leave this. Which isn’t fair either. Because all he really means is, I get it. I’d drag the kid states away too if it meant I could take care of him forever.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Piece By Piece (English Version)
entry.summary:
Author: Pookiebrin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,573Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 1,027

Summary: Buck had finally understood... it had taken him 3 months, 3 months of silences and angry looks, of orders given coldly and endless lists of tasks at the station, of people leaving when he sat down at the table, of conversations stopping when he arrived.3 months but he had finally understood: Station 118 did not forgive and those he had fought for had turned their backs on him.3 months but it had become clear to him: he was not welcome there and that was not his family, it never had been. And now all that was left was to let go. But a call and a girl who reminds him too much of himself could be the solution to the cold in his life and his heart.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Signal 118
entry.summary:
Author: paigelenzy23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck is one of the LAFD's most fearless firefighters. Eddie Diaz is an LAPD detective who specializes in suspicious fires. Their worlds collide when a routine apartment blaze becomes the first case in a string of connected arsons spreading across Los Angeles. Forced to work together, they uncover more than a dangerous conspiracy—they begin to discover that home might not be a place at all, but a person.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: i’ll find you (in this lifetime and every one after)
entry.summary:
Author: decodediaz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,947Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 171

Summary: “You- You found me.” Eddie looks up from his crossword. He’s never seen Buck look so… small, except from when he was in that hospital bed, refusing to look at Eddie. He tries to push the image out of his head. “I did.” Eddie says simply, because of course he did. He’ll always find Buck, just like Buck always finds him.   or   in which buck never tells chim. he spirals out of control, until he does something he can never take back.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Angel of the Waves
entry.summary:
Author: FlamingSword_ofAzi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,508Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 458

Summary: Soulmate AU where Eddie joins the 118 after the ladder-truck bombing. Buck feels left alone and hopeless after the pulmonary embolism and decides to go to the pier to clear his head. Meanwhile, Shannon who never got into an accident takes out Christopher to the beach to get to know each other better.What could go wrong?

entry.title: A Year Of You And Me
entry.summary:
Author: LibbyWrites

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,570Chapters: 182/?Kudos: 126

Summary: In spite of his skepticism, Eddie decides to start journaling, following his therapist's advice. The man gives him a list of 365 prompts and questions to write about each day, to help him untangle the mess his brain has become. Under the knots, he might find much more than just peace of mind.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: somewhere over the rainbow
entry.summary:
Author: mappingmadness

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,303Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: There's a billboard. That's in itself is pretty normal, billboards are a normal part of LA; advertisers like having somewhere big and visible, and what better place than a billboard? It should be fine. This billboard should not be bothering Eddie at all, except— Except. There's a giant fucking rainbow. It's like—and Eddie isn't even exaggerating here—the whole billboard is essentially taken up by a massive, striped rainbow. Each brightly colored strip must be at least two feet high and seven wide, if not bigger. It's—it's obscene, quite frankly. Unnecessary. Also incredibly hard to miss, Eddie can't believe he didn't notice it before. Boy, is he noticing it now. Fuck. He's—he's doing the thing again. The thing where his face flushes and his palms sweat and his heart beats entirely too fast to the point that he feels on the verge of a panic attack, and there's nothing to even be afraid of.  Just a big, stupid fucking rainbow. Or,Eddie is haunted by the rainbow.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
